meta.title: Thanksgiving in Combat with MACV-SOG Legend John Stryker Meyer
meta.description:
John Stryker “Tilt” Meyer is an absolute legend in the Special Forces community and the Veteran community at large. It was an honor to have him on Manpower and you can look forward to another story from him come Christmas.

For those who don’t know, MACV-SOG was operational during the Vietnam War, where they ran secret missions across the borders of Vietnam into Laos, Cambodia, and often up in North Vietnam. For a long time, their missions were classified and their existence a secret. Now, men like Meyer are trying to make sure their actions aren’t forgotten and the sacrifices some of those Soldiers made are known to the American public.

Interested in the gear MACV-SOG guys used to carry? Check this out: https://www.sandboxx.us/news/the-gear-that-macv-sog-warriors-carried-and-how-its-still-relevant-today/ 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social:
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews 
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews 
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

Grab John Stryker Meyer’s books:
Across the Fence: https://www.amazon.com/Across-Fence-John-Stryker-Meyer/dp/0983256705/ 
On the Ground: https://www.amazon.com/Ground-Secret-War-Vietnam/dp/B08RQS2PH6/ 
SOG Chronicles: Volume One: https://www.amazon.com/Audible-SOG-Chronicles-Volume-One/dp/B0BHZT9CKD/ 
Volume Two is coming soon!

Find him on social media:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jstrykermeyer/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JohnStrykerMeyer 

Video Chapters:

00:00 – Introduction
00:18 – Getting the Mission
02:07 – The Mission Begins
04:19 – “Petty Politics” of the Time
05:03 – Sneaking in More Thanksgiving Dinners
